rounds: Two weeks of holding the line on routine — that's not nothing, that's actually a win. But the Apollo ring moment? Colleague opens a door and you closed it. The ring stayed on your finger, which counts. The conversation didn't, which also counts.
pattern: They're letting you wear the thing but not say the thing.
focus: Next time someone asks about the ring, you don't have to explain Apollo. You just have to not shut it down. One sentence. Any sentence.
